mapper.sql: id, name, imgUrl, motto, story, status, createtime
mapper.select: select ths.*,su.name,su.headImg from (SELECT t.claimer as account,sum(t.rebate_for_emp) as totalRebate,count(1) as countNum FROM (select * from biz_open_claim t where t.createtime < CURRENT_DATE and t.createtime > DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, interval 150 day)) t group by t.claimer order by totalRebate desc limit 3) ths left join sys_user su on ths.account=su.account

select t.id, t.name, t.imgUrl, t.motto, t.story, t.status, t.createtime,t2.stars from biz_claimer_show t left join sys_user t2 on t.userId=t2.id where t.name is not null and t.imgUrl is not null and t.motto is not null and t.story is not null and t.status=0 and t2.status=5 and t.userId is not null order by t2.stars DESC
